mapper.select: /* usimDlvryMgmtMapper.getUsimDlvryDtlList */ SELECT B.USIM_BUY_SEQ , A.SELF_DLVRY_IDX , B.MYSLF_DLVR_SEQ , A.REQ_BUY_QNTY || '-' || ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.SELF_DLVRY_IDX ORDER BY B.CRET_DT, B.USIM_BUY_SEQ DESC) AS QNTY_SORT , (SELECT DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'usimProdDetailInfo' AND DTL_CD = A.USIM_PROD_DTL_ID) AS USIM_PROD_DTL_NM , B.REQ_USIM_SN , B.REQ_USIM_SN AS REQ_USIM_SN_ORG , B.SVC_CNTR_NO , TO_CHAR(B.CRET_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CRET_DT , B.CRET_ID , B.AMD_DT , B.AMD_ID FROM MCP_REQUEST_SELF_DLVRY@DL_MCP A , NMCP_USIM_BUY_TXN@DL_MCP B WHERE A.SELF_DLVRY_IDX = B.MYSLF_DLVR_SEQ(+) AND B.MYSLF_DLVR_SEQ = #{selfDlvryIdx} ORDER BY A.SELF_DLVRY_IDX DESC, B.CRET_DT, B.USIM_BUY_SEQ DESC
SELECT DTL_CD AS TB_CD FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'PERCEL' AND DTL_CD_NM = TRIM(#{tbNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

SELECT CASE WHEN TO_NUMBER(A.CNT) < TO_NUMBER(B.REQ_BUY_QNTY) THEN 'Y' WHEN TO_NUMBER(A.CNT) = TO_NUMBER(B.REQ_BUY_QNTY) THEN 'E' ELSE 'N' END AS OVER_CHK FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) CNT FROM NMCP_USIM_BUY_TXN@DL_MCP WHERE MYSLF_DLVR_SEQ = #{selfDlvryIdx, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND REQ_USIM_SN IS NOT NULL ) A , ( SELECT REQ_BUY_QNTY FROM MCP_REQUEST_SELF_DLVRY@DL_MCP WHERE SELF_DLVRY_IDX = #{selfDlvryIdx, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) B

SELECT /* usimDlvryMgmtMapper.getUsimBuySeqNull */ USIM_BUY_SEQ FROM NMCP_USIM_BUY_TXN@DL_MCP WHERE MYSLF_DLVR_SEQ = #{selfDlvryIdx, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND REQ_USIM_SN IS NULL ORDER BY USIM_BUY_SEQ DESC
